title: Fix account selection, add transaction button, and transfer dropdowns

requirements.summary: Fix account selector dropdown in Add Transaction modal to allow interactive account selection
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking the account dropdown in the Add Transaction modal opens the options list
Selecting an account updates the displayed value in the dropdown
The selected account value is used when submitting the transaction form

file_operations.description: Fix the account selector dropdown by ensuring the select element has proper value binding to React state, onChange handler is correctly wired, and the selected account ID is properly captured. Verify that the Select component from shadcn/ui is correctly configured with SelectTrigger, SelectValue, SelectContent, and SelectItem elements, and that the account state variable is initialized and updated on selection.

requirements.summary: Fix Add/Submit button in Add Transaction modal to properly submit the transaction form
acceptanceCriteria: The Add button is enabled and clickable when required fields are filled
Clicking Add submits the form and calls the add transaction mutation
A loading state is shown while the mutation is in progress
On success, the modal closes and the transaction appears in the records list

file_operations.description: Fix the Add/Submit button by ensuring it is not inadvertently disabled, form validation is triggered on click, and the useAddTransaction mutation is properly invoked with all required transaction fields. Add loading state display using mutation.isPending and ensure the modal closes on successful submission by calling onOpenChange(false) in the mutation's onSuccess callback.

requirements.summary: Fix From and To account selector dropdowns in Transfer Money modal to allow independent account selection
acceptanceCriteria: The From account dropdown lists all user accounts and allows selection
The To account dropdown lists all user accounts and allows selection
Selecting a value in From or To updates the displayed value immediately
The correct from and to account IDs are passed to the useTransferMoney mutation on submit

file_operations.description: Fix the From and To account selector dropdowns by ensuring each has independent React state variables (fromAccountId and toAccountId), proper value binding to their respective Select components, and correct onChange handlers that update the corresponding state. Verify that both account IDs are correctly passed to the useTransferMoney mutation call on form submission and that each selector independently reflects the chosen account value.

requirements.summary: Fix Transfer button in Accounts page to properly open TransferMoneyModal with functional account selection
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking the Transfer button on any account in the Accounts page opens the TransferMoneyModal
The modal renders all account selector fields without errors
The user can complete the transfer form and submit it successfully
After a successful transfer, account balances update to reflect the transfer

file_operations.description: Fix the Transfer button action by ensuring the TransferMoneyModal component is properly imported and rendered conditionally based on modal open state. Verify that clicking the Transfer option on an account correctly sets the transfer modal state to open and that the modal receives any necessary props (such as selectedAccountId for pre-filling). Ensure the modal's onOpenChange handler is wired correctly to close the modal after successful transfer.
